data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for retainage release upon 100% completion.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the retainage release trigger upon 100% completion, but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions the retainage release, it lacks concrete evidence of its implementation or validation, leading to an inconclusive assessment. The absence of specific API endpoints or entities related to the retainage release process further supports this conclusion.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or entities for retainage release upon 100% completion.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the retainage release upon 100% completion.
